name: autodarts-plus-extension
description: Enhances AutoDarts with new functions, customization options, and much more.

scripts.zip: vite build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const archiver = require('archiver'); const output = fs.createWriteStream('autodarts-plus-v1.2.0.zip'); const archive = archiver('zip'); archive.pipe(output); archive.directory('dist/', false); archive.finalize();"
